name: Agent Kanban
description: Multi-agent task board. Creates git worktrees per task, launches claude/codex/gemini/cline with live output streaming and task dependency chains.
author: contex

actions.name: createTask
actions.description: Create a new task. Params: { prompt, agentId?, baseRef?, columnId? }

actions.name: startTask
actions.description: Start an agent on a task. Params: { taskId }

actions.name: completeTask
actions.description: Mark a task done (move to trash). Params: { taskId }

actions.name: getBoard
actions.description: Return the current board state as JSON.

actions.name: getSummary
actions.description: Return the current summary widget model as JSON.
